extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR Tadej won Stage 13 to Los Machucos attacking final 1.5km, with ROGLIČ playing team tactics settling for second to protect red jersey
tactical_patterns: Movistar deployed QUINTANA offensively on final climb rather than defensively, dropped LÓPEZ despite teammate status showing conflicting GC priorities.
ROGLIČ allowed POGAČAR stage win in apparent gentleman's agreement despite ability to contest sprint, prioritizing time gaps over stage.
29-rider breakaway formation indicates peloton willing to concede massive groups when GC teams confident in climbing superiority.
HÉRADA attacked precisely at categorized summit for KOM points then sat in, revealing optimal timing pattern for jersey hunters.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: at 20 years old won second stage and moved into genuine podium contention from 3:05 down, attacking decisively final 1.5km
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: negative: dropped on final climb losing over 1 minute, fell to fifth overall despite being considered main ROGLIČ threat
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: rode aggressively for Movistar on final climb rather than supporting co-leader LÓPEZ, limiting losses to 27 seconds
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: hung on through maximal effort finishing with QUINTANA group at 27 seconds, but losing ground in GC battle
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: controlled POGAČAR's winning move by finishing second at same time, intelligent team tactics prioritizing jersey over stage glory
